title: Small Spear
description: This texture pack makes all of the spears smaller.
body:
This texture pack simply makes all of the spears smaller while keeping the vanllia textures.

**Vanilla**

![Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64e5d2feae0cbc6a69340dfa167dcedf73951e55.jpeg)

**With Small Spears**

![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1db03453d314ba9e4bfed66386168122caed773.jpeg)
